LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL AND ENTER A JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO A STIPULATION. GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. THE MARCH 2, 2015 DISMISSAL IS VACATED. DISCOVER BANK IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT YASMIN SHAIKH IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,389.22 INCLUSIVE OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS OF SUIT. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER/JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/HK)

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DISMISSAL
Off Calendar Jun-20-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK's MOTION TO VACATE DISMISSAL AND ENTER A JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO A STIPULATION.

Plaintiff Discover Bank's motion to set aside dismissal and enter judgment is granted. No opposition filed and good cause shown. The March 2, 2015 dismissal is vacated. Discover Bank is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Yasmin Shaikh in the amount of $2,389.22 inclusive of attorney's fees and costs of suit.

Order and Judgment signed. (see scanned order/judgment for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
